product_overview: STTYLUS is a web app that connects clients and barbers for quick appointment booking and gives professionals a simple dashboard to manage their day, services and notifications.
core_goals: Allow clients to find a barber, choose a service, pick a date/time and confirm an appointment in a few steps
Allow barbers to view and manage their daily agenda, mark appointments complete and control availability
Prevent basic scheduling conflicts by showing occupied time slots and avoiding duplicate bookings
Deliver real-time notifications to barbers when new appointments are created
Provide separate experiences for client and professional profiles

features.name: Authentication (email/password)
features.description: Create an account or sign in with email and password; signup can include an invite code to create a barber profile. Successful auth routes users to the correct area based on profile role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Toggle to Signup mode -> Fill in full name -> Fill in phone -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Enter invite code (optional) -> Submit signup form -> Be redirected to /professional-dashboard if invite code creates a barber profile or to /client-home for a client profile
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email and password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to /professional-dashboard for barbers or /client-home for clients
Navigate to /login -> Toggle to Login mode -> Fill in email only or leave password blank -> Attempt to submit -> See validation error prompting for missing password

features.name: Client Booking (end-to-end)
features.description: Clients browse services and available barbers, select a service, choose date and time within the next 7 days, and confirm an appointment. The system prevents selecting occupied slots and creates a notification for the barber.
user_flows: Navigate to /client-home -> View available services and barbers and availability states -> Select a service (or use a pre-selected service) -> Navigate to /client-home/agendar -> Select a barber who is accepting appointments -> Select a date within the next 7 days -> Select an available time slot -> Confirm the appointment -> See booking confirmation

Navigate to /client-home -> Select a barber first -> Navigate to /client-home/agendar -> Select a service if not pre-selected -> Select date and available time slot -> Confirm appointment -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /client-home/agendar -> Attempt to confirm without selecting a time -> See validation error prompting selection of a time slot

features.name: Professional Dashboard (day view & realtime notifications)
features.description: Barbers see today's summary (earnings and appointments), the next client, receive real-time notifications for new bookings, and can mark appointments as completed. They can also toggle whether they accept new appointments.
user_flows: Navigate to /professional-dashboard -> See today's stats including estimated earnings and total appointments -> See next client details for upcoming appointment -> Toggle availability to start or stop accepting appointments -> Receive a new appointment notification in real time and hear the alert sound -> Open notifications list and see the new notification marked unread -> Open a notification and have it marked as read
Navigate to /professional-dashboard -> View next appointment details -> Mark the appointment as completed (check-in) -> See the appointment status update in the dashboard

features.name: Professional Agenda (date-filtered schedule)
features.description: Barbers view their schedule filtered by date across a sliding range and can change appointment status (pending, concluded, canceled).
user_flows: Navigate to /professional-dashboard/agenda -> See the list of appointments for the currently selected date -> Change the visible date within the allowed range to view other days -> Open an appointment detail -> Change appointment status to concluded -> See the updated status in the appointment list
Navigate to /professional-dashboard/agenda -> Open an appointment detail -> Change appointment status to canceled -> See the updated status in the appointment list

features.name: Services Management (barber CRUD)
features.description: Barbers create, edit and delete services tied to their account (name, description, price, duration). New or updated services appear in their list and are available to clients when the barber is accepting appointments.
user_flows: Navigate to /professional-dashboard/servicos -> View list of services for the logged-in barber -> Create a new service by entering name, description, price and duration -> Save the service -> See the new service appear in the list associated with the logged-in barber
Navigate to /professional-dashboard/servicos -> Select an existing service from the list -> Edit name, price or duration -> Save changes -> See the updated service in the list
Navigate to /professional-dashboard/servicos -> Select an existing service -> Delete the service -> See the service removed from the list

features.name: Profile Management (client & barber)
features.description: Users edit their profile data (full name, phone, avatar) and have the barber-specific field for availability. Changes persist to the user's profile and the avatar is stored and referenced by public URL.
user_flows: Navigate to /client-home/perfil -> Edit full name -> Edit phone -> Upload or change avatar -> Save profile -> See updated profile information persisted

Navigate to /professional-dashboard/perfil -> Edit full name -> Edit phone -> Upload or change avatar -> Toggle is_accepting_appointments to control visibility in booking flows -> Save profile -> See updated profile and availability reflected across the app

routes.description: Home page for clients showing services and available barbers
Step-by-step appointment booking flow for clients
Dashboard for barbers with today's appointments and real-time notifications
OAuth callback route for Supabase authentication

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login with email/password or Google OAuth, and signup with optional invite code for barbers.
user_interactions: Fill email and password input fields
Toggle between Login and Signup modes
Enter full name, phone, and optional invite code (signup)
Click 'Entrar com Google' to authenticate via OAuth
View error messages on invalid credentials

features.name: Client Booking
features.description: Booking an appointment selecting barber, service, date and time.
user_interactions: Click on a service to pre-select it
Select a barber from the list
Select a date from the next 7 days

features.name: Professional Dashboard
features.description: View daily appointments, earnings, and next client in real-time.
user_interactions: Click bell icon to view notifications
